creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Could you do a simple listening test? Use SOX for example to playback a pure sine wave, like 300-400Hz. Play it for 1-5 minutes and see if you can hear any phase shifts. The USB audio specification is very silent about how playback only devices should be synchronized when asynchronous isochronous endpoints are used. Another possibility is to collect logs from other operating systems and compare, or maybe I need to buy one of these myself ...
